summary: Completed backend testing of P2 background jobs feature (APScheduler integration). All 20 tests pass. Verified scheduler is running, all 3 jobs are scheduled correctly, and manual trigger endpoints work as expected.
passed_tests: GET /api/background-jobs/status requires authentication (401)
GET /api/background-jobs/status returns 200 with valid auth
GET /api/background-jobs/status returns correct structure (running, jobs, scheduler_active)
Scheduler is running=true and scheduler_active=true after server startup
All 3 expected jobs are scheduled: task_status_update, daily_reminders, daily_health_snapshots
Each job has correct structure (id, name, next_run_time, pending)
POST /api/background-jobs/run/task-status-update requires authentication (401)
POST /api/background-jobs/run/task-status-update returns 200
POST /api/background-jobs/run/task-status-update returns correct structure (success, message, tasks_updated)
POST /api/background-jobs/run/daily-reminders requires authentication (401)
POST /api/background-jobs/run/daily-reminders returns 200
POST /api/background-jobs/run/daily-reminders returns correct structure (success, message, emails_sent)
POST /api/background-jobs/run/health-snapshots requires authentication (401)
POST /api/background-jobs/run/health-snapshots returns 200
POST /api/background-jobs/run/health-snapshots returns correct structure (success, message, snapshots_created)
Task status update integration - correctly processes overdue tasks
Health snapshots integration - creates snapshot records for trusts
task_status_update job is scheduled hourly (next run within 60 minutes)
daily_reminders job is scheduled at 9:00 AM UTC daily
daily_health_snapshots job is scheduled at 00:05 UTC daily
context_for_next_testing_agent: Background jobs P2 feature fully tested. APScheduler is correctly integrated with FastAPI startup/shutdown events. 3 scheduled jobs: (1) task_status_update - hourly via IntervalTrigger, (2) daily_reminders - 9 AM UTC via CronTrigger, (3) daily_health_snapshots - 00:05 UTC via CronTrigger. Manual trigger endpoints work correctly. All endpoints require authentication.

scheduled_jobs.name: Update task statuses based on due dates
